SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 10 AND 20;
SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 30;
SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 5 OR value NOT BETWEEN 30 AND 40;
SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE NOT(value BETWEEN 10 AND 15) AND value > 18;
SELECT value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE value < 30) AS subquery WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 10 AND 20;
SELECT tr1.value FROM test_range tr1 JOIN test_range tr2 ON tr1.value <> tr2.value WHERE tr1.value NOT BETWEEN 10 AND 30 AND tr2.value >= 20;
SELECT value FROM test_range WHERE NOT(value BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_range) AND (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_range));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_range WHERE value NOT BETWEEN (SELECT 10) AND (SELECT 25);
